description: An account manager needs to generate a report for a client demonstrating patch compliance for all their managed servers.

nodes.task_description: Use the RMM tool to generate a patch compliance report for all the client's servers.

expected_outcome.value: A report is generated showing which patches are installed or missing on each server.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the report to calculate the overall compliance percentage.

expected_outcome.value: The analysis shows that 98% of all applicable patches are installed.

nodes.task_description: Provide the report to the client.

expected_outcome.value: The client receives the compliance report.
